title: cota amblyolepis
intro: Cota amblyolepis, also known as Rock Cota, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, sore throat, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Cota amblyolepis include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health benefits, including wound healing, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
